overview.description: Custom AI, computer vision, and NLP development company with 15+ years of experience
overview.description_long: ImageMetry is an advanced AI development consultancy founded in 2008 by PhD researchers in Prague. For over 15 years they have helped businesses automate workflows and build AI-powered products using computer vision, NLP, and machine learning. Services include OCR, document processing, face recognition, object detection, video understanding, image tampering detection, and augmented reality. They serve diverse industries including healthcare, finance, supply chain, ecommerce, legal, and government.

history.origin_story: Founded in 2008 by a group of PhD researchers in Prague; built on academic research in image analysis and computer vision

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by PhD researchers
Awarded by City of New York (presented by Mayor Michael Bloomberg)
Received prestigious Czech Head award from Czech Republic government
Selected by World Economic Forum to contribute to critical ICT projects of UN

awards: City of New York Award (presented by Mayor Michael Bloomberg)
World Economic Forum — selected for UN critical ICT projects

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: ImageMetry builds custom AI solutions (OCR, document processing, face recognition, tampering detection) that are increasingly replicable by foundation models. However, their 15+ years of domain expertise, client relationships, and academic pedigree (PhD founders, peer-reviewed publications) provide some differentiation in high-stakes verticals like government and legal.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Custom AI consulting serves a real market across many industries, but the company is very small (2-10 employees) which limits scale, and competition from larger AI consultancies is intense. Their dual Prague/US presence suggests market validation but unclear revenue scale.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding; appears bootstrapped. However, the company has operated for 15+ years suggesting sustainability, and has prestigious award recognition. Small team keeps burn rate low, but growth capacity is constrained.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: A long-established boutique AI consultancy with strong academic credentials and notable recognition, but very small size and consulting model make it vulnerable to commoditization by foundation models and competition from larger AI services firms.

metadata.notes: LinkedIn shows 2-10 employees. Company has two offices: Prague (HQ) and Sunnyvale, CA. Founded in 2008 by PhD researchers Babak Mahdian (CEO) and Radim Nedbal (CTO). No CNAIP URL available. Glassdoor data not found.
